title: galeopsis tetrahit
intro: Galeopsis tetrahit, also known as hemp nettle or hemp nettle, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, helping to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Galeopsis tetrahit include reducing inflammation, soothing sore throats, and promoting overall well-being. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be consumed orally or applied topically for its therapeutic benefits.
